== Notes for [[Item:Q84748|Q84748]] ==


Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Family_tree_of_Uthman

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uthman_ibn_Affan#Family_of_Uthman

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3144FC07D1EFBC189822EF79916CB079
geni:6000000021371962553

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
